title: Luffy Returns to the Sky — Part 3
description: Luffy comes back for the final exchange against Doflamingo.
scene: On pages 13–17, Luffy, King Riku, Rebecca, Viola, Dressrosa Citizens move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: In truth, Lucy is also known by another name!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The person under Lucy's mask was...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We, who were deceived by and ruled over for so many years by a pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: May have trouble placing our faith in one! But...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This pirate is nothing like the donquixote that appeared that fateful night, 10 years ago... wearing the illusory mask of a hero!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: the true king, Lord Riku himself, has declared this man our hope!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: right now; this man, wounded in battle; lies on the ground, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Dress- Rosa! Know this and quake with happen-ness!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Lucy has promised us the following!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HihoHo! He's got a mouth on him, that one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: If you don't, Luffy... We won't be able to hold out for much longer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Can you hear me, Dofla- Mingo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: you, who manipulated our king! You, who deceived the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I can see everything you're doing! If you're gonna come for me, then come!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Step Away from Miss Viola and Rebecca!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: The Star Born in our Colos- Seum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: and until that moment, we have but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: The time limit has been reached!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: The wounded that recovered out of the blue earlier... they're...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: The people who first received the powers of the Dandelion have reached their time limit! Its powers won't work on them again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry! I'm so sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: It's all because I wasn't strong enough!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: I showed you hope for a brief moment, but then... I've stolen it away! How cruel!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: No... you're wrong! Princess, had it not been for your dandelions, there's no telling how many people would have died to bird cage by now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: You have worked a miracle! It's enough that your power's have taken us this far! Luffyland will handle the rest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I know he will get rid of this cage for us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Exchange places with those who have fallen!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Until Lucy destroys this bird cage for good!

summary: This part focuses on luffy returns to the sky, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
